notes: Lisa Contè is an Italian heritage brand established in the late 1980s by artisans Giuseppe and Maela in Tuscany. The brand specializes in premium leather and shearling outerwear. This tailored jacket in black lambskin is consistent with the brand's core product line of soft lambskin leather garments made in Italy. Size F40 is a European women's size. The descriptor '極上柔らかい羊革' (extremely soft lambskin) confirms the premium quality characteristic of Lisa Contè pieces.
